title: Add Meshtastic app-visibility smoke harness for inbound events
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.8 acceptance requires app display behavior to be smoke-testable, but current qemu tests only validate encoded FromRadio bytes and adapter queue semantics. What needs to be done: add a no-hardware smoke harness or scripted fixture that feeds incoming message/status events through the compatibility path and verifies a Meshtastic-app-compatible client view without physical BLE phones or radios.
